prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GT2860RS Gen II (ball-bearing, 60mm compressor, 56mm turbine) for the 1.6L Gamma II T-GDI (engine code G4FJ) to achieve 320whp on E85 with supporting fuel system upgrades (Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, and Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator).

Full bolt-on engine reinforcement with ARP head studs (PN 208-4301), ACL Race Series main and rod bearings (PN 4B634H), and a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe with Vibrant 1799 resonator for optimized turbo spool and reduced backpressure.

Drivetrain and transmission upgrades including a South Bend Clutch Stage 2 Daily (organic/copper hybrid disc) with lightweight aluminum flywheel (PN 04-000-DFW-ALK), Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential (80% lock), and a Kia Motorsport short-shift kit (PN 0K30E-1G000) for the 6-speed manual transmission (M6CF3).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (FORTE GT-specific, PN LB-0419) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a Seibon Carbon hood (PN KF-12A2-010-HC) for weight reduction and aggressive stance.

OEM+ aggressive styling with a Kia Motorsport front bumper lip (PN 0K301-1G000), custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors, and a set of WORK Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/18).

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro Sportster CS seats (PN 391-000) with custom Kia Forte GT-specific mounting brackets, a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (PN SRK-200B) paired with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel, and a full custom roll cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing) by Custom Cages UK for chassis rigidity and safety.
